name: Qdrant Backup
summary: Scheduled backups of every Qdrant collection to Cloudflare R2.
description: Schedule automatic backups of every Qdrant collection to Cloudflare R2 (S3-compatible). Configure once in a form; the plugin provisions a managed Script, secrets, a data store, and a schedule for you, and shows a backup dashboard.
author: Hasan Aboul Hasan
